metadata.description: Demon enemy type catalog with base stats and traits
metadata.usage: Provides base enemy types for pattern generation
notes: Base catalog of demons with inherent stats and traits. Each item has individual properties. Type-level traits apply to all items in category.
Abyssal demons category added for main quest mid-game boss (Quest #5)
Demon lords category contains final boss (Dark Lord) for main quest (Quest #6)
